mapper.select: SELECT VALUE_NAME FROM NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ WHERE KEY_NAME = #{keyName}

insert.if:
INSERT INTO IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF ( STRIFID, STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP, INTYEAR, INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN, INTWEEK, INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT, FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN, FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS, FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX, FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX, FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX, INSERT_TIME ) VALUES
( #{item.strIfID}, #{item.strResID}, #{item.strTypeMin}, #{item.intTimestamp}, #{item.intYear}, #{item.intMonth}, #{item.intDay}, #{item.intHour}, #{item.intMin}, #{item.intWeek}, #{item.intBandwidth}, #{item.flHCInOctets}, #{item.flHCOutOctets}, #{item.fltPPSIn}, #{item.fltPPSOut}, #{item.fltErrorIn}, #{item.fltErrorOut}, #{item.fltDiscardIn}, #{item.fltDiscardOut}, #{item.fltUnknown}, #{item.fltUsage}, #{item.flHCInOctets}, #{item.flHCOutOctets}, #{item.flHCInUcastPkts}, #{item.flHCOutUcastPkts}, #{item.flHCInMulticastPkts}, #{item.flHCOutMulticastPkts}, #{item.flHCInBroadcastPkts}, #{item.flHCOutBroadcastPkts}, #{item.fltBPSInMax}, #{item.fltBPSOutMax}, #{item.fltPPSInMax}, #{item.fltPPSOutMax}, #{item.fltErrorInMax}, #{item.fltErrorOutMax}, #{item.fltDiscardInMax}, #{item.fltDiscardOutMax}, #{item.fltUnknownMax}, #{item.fltUsageMax}, now() )

mapper.update: UPDATE NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ SET VALUE_NAME = #{value}, YD_DATE = now() WHERE KEY_NAME = #{key}
